meta.title: Toon Studio | Animation Studio and Creative Agency in Sri Lanka
meta.description: Toon Studio is a Sri Lankan animation studio and creative agency specialising in animation, video production, creative design, comics and social media campaigns.

hero.subtitle: Sri Lanka's premium animation studio & creative agency — turning imagination into motion since 2018.

whoWeAre.label: ( Who are we? )
whoWeAre.headline: We are a bunch of daydreamers gathered around to tell wonderful stories.
whoWeAre.description: We are Sri Lanka's premium animation studio and creative agency — turning imagination into motion since 2018.

strength.label: Our strength
strength.headline: Think bold. Think big.
paragraphs: Creativity is our major strength and passion. We love to think bold, think big, and think unique.
We are a bunch of storytellers with unique skill sets in every area of production.
Active in the industry since 2018, we are well-equipped with experience we bring to every future work.
strength.quote: We are here to help build brands and grow companies.
strength.footer: In the rapidly changing world of marketing communications, we find it necessary to stay current with the changes that affect our clients.

services.title: Animation Production
services.description: Have you ever imagined something impossible to see in our physical realm? With animation we have the superpower of bringing anything to life. Our team is ready to make your dream come true.

services.title: Video Production
services.description: Through the lens we capture not just moments but emotions, carefully calculated to speak to an audience — igniting desire and passion through visuals.

services.title: Creative Design
services.description: One of the most compelling ways of telling stories. With our skilled graphic designers, we can take your brand to heights you haven't even imagined.

services.title: Comics
services.description: Enjoy glimpses of a wonderful voyage through the inked lines of artists. Comics are a highly effective way to reach any audience — from children to adults.

services.title: Social Media Campaigns
services.description: Strategists, writers, designers and content creators telling remarkable stories — building brand awareness and gaining more customers around your brand.

founders.name: Harith Kumarasinghe
founders.bio: A multi-talented entrepreneur, filmmaker, animator, comic artist, writer and creative director with 10+ years in the creative industry. In 2018 he founded Toon Studio with his brother — a dreamer of a better world.

founders.name: Chamith Kumarasinghe
founders.bio: A well-experienced producer, cinematographer, marketing strategist and creative director with 10+ years in the industry. His expertise in cinematography is showcased throughout Toon Studio's video production unit.

footer.copyright: All rights reserved | Toon Studio (Pvt) Ltd
